title: Global Business Process Owner - OTC & PTP
description:
• Shape end‑ to‑ end finance processes across retail, B2B, B2C, and omnichannel
  • Operate with strong visibility and influence at senior leadership level

About Our Client

A major Singapore-based organization with a strong commitment to operational excellence and digital transformation. The company fosters innovation and collaboration across diverse business units and functions.

Job Description

  • Own and govern end‑to‑end OTC and PTP processes across B2B, B2C, and omnichannel environments
  • Lead retail‑focused OTC process design covering order capture, billing, collections, disputes, and customer experience
  • Define global process standards, KPIs, and transformation roadmaps
  • Drive automation and digitisation across ERP, RPA, AI, and workflow solutions
  • Partner with Finance, Commercial, IT, and Shared Services as the senior process authority

The Successful Applicant

  • 10+ years' experience in OTC/PTP, Shared Services, or process transformation roles
  • Strong retail OTC experience with exposure to B2B, B2C, and omnichannel models
  • Proven ownership of end‑to‑end global processes and large‑scale transformation initiatives
  • Solid knowledge of finance controls, SFRS, and tax compliance
  • Hands‑on experience with SAP, S2P/P2P platforms, and automation technologies
  • Strong stakeholder management skills and senior leadership presence

What's on Offer

  • Opportunity to lead strategic transformation initiatives in a dynamic environment.
  • Exposure to cutting-edge technologies and process automation.
  • Collaborative culture with strong leadership support for innovation.
